welcome.simpleMeaning: Hello! Come in and feel happy here
welcome.contextMeaning: A friendly hello at the start of the school message

ovi.simpleMeaning: A name for a person or place
ovi.contextMeaning: The name of this English school or website

english.simpleMeaning: The language many people speak and learn
english.contextMeaning: The language taught at this school

school.contextMeaning: A place for learning, with a cafe inside

emi.contextMeaning: The person who feels hungry in the sentence
emi.sentence: Emi is hungry, and the chicken sandwich is gone.

hungry.contextMeaning: Feeling like you need food now
hungry.sentence: Emi is hungry, and the chicken sandwich is gone.

chicken.sentence: Emi is hungry, and the chicken sandwich is gone.

sandwich.simpleMeaning: Food between two pieces of bread
sandwich.contextMeaning: A food with bread and filling
sandwich.sentence: Emi is hungry, and the chicken sandwich is gone.

gone.contextMeaning: The sandwich is not available anymore
gone.sentence: Emi is hungry, and the chicken sandwich is gone.

what.simpleMeaning: Asking about a thing or answer
what.contextMeaning: Asking for the next words or action

next.contextMeaning: The words or action after this

today.contextMeaning: On this day, not another day
today.sentence: Today, you will hear a simple lunch order at a school cafe.

hear.contextMeaning: To listen to the lunch order story
hear.sentence: Today, you will hear a simple lunch order at a school cafe.

simple.contextMeaning: Easy and not hard to understand
simple.sentence: Today, you will hear a simple lunch order at a school cafe.

lunch.simpleMeaning: Food you eat in the middle of the day
lunch.contextMeaning: The meal they want at school, with a drink
lunch.sentence: Today, you will hear a simple lunch order at a school cafe.

order.simpleMeaning: To ask for food or things you want
order.contextMeaning: To ask for lunch at the cafe
order.sentence: Today, you will hear a simple lunch order at a school cafe.

cafe.simpleMeaning: A small place where you buy food and drinks
cafe.contextMeaning: The school place where they buy food
cafe.sentence: Today, you will hear a simple lunch order at a school cafe.

listen.simpleMeaning: To hear with care and pay attention
listen.contextMeaning: Pay attention to the prices, choices, and polite answers
listen.sentence: Listen for prices, choices, and polite answers.

prices.contextMeaning: How much the food and drinks cost
prices.sentence: Listen for prices, choices, and polite answers.

choices.simpleMeaning: Different things you can pick from
choices.contextMeaning: Different foods or drinks they can pick
choices.sentence: Listen for prices, choices, and polite answers.

polite.simpleMeaning: Kind and nice with good manners
polite.contextMeaning: Speaking in a calm and nice way
polite.sentence: Listen for prices, choices, and polite answers.

answers.simpleMeaning: Things you say back to a question
answers.contextMeaning: What people say back in the talk
answers.sentence: Listen for prices, choices, and polite answers.

more.sentence: For more practice, visit ovi english dot com.

practice.simpleMeaning: Doing something again to get better
practice.contextMeaning: Extra time to try and learn more
practice.sentence: For more practice, visit ovi english dot com.

visit.simpleMeaning: To go and see a place
visit.sentence: For more practice, visit ovi english dot com.

dot.contextMeaning: The small mark in the website name
dot.sentence: For more practice, visit ovi english dot com.

com.simpleMeaning: Letters used in many website names
com.contextMeaning: The ending part of the website name
com.sentence: For more practice, visit ovi english dot com.

ready.sentence: Ready to hear the menu problem and the easy fix?

menu.simpleMeaning: A list of food and drinks
menu.contextMeaning: The list of food they can choose from
menu.sentence: Ready to hear the menu problem and the easy fix?

problem.contextMeaning: A small thing that is not right with the menu
problem.sentence: Ready to hear the menu problem and the easy fix?

easy.sentence: Ready to hear the menu problem and the easy fix?

fix.contextMeaning: A way to make the menu problem better
fix.sentence: Ready to hear the menu problem and the easy fix?

let.simpleMeaning: Used to say we should do something
let.contextMeaning: A friendly way to say, “We should eat.”

eat.contextMeaning: Have food in the mouth and swallow it

before.contextMeaning: Eat first, then go to club time

club.simpleMeaning: A place or group for fun activities
club.contextMeaning: The place or activity they will go to later

time.contextMeaning: The moment for the club starts

open.contextMeaning: The school cafe is ready for people now
open.sentence: A: The school cafe is open now.

now.contextMeaning: At this moment, the cafe is open
now.sentence: A: The school cafe is open now.

great.contextMeaning: A happy answer meaning “That is good.”

want.simpleMeaning: To like something and wish for it
want.contextMeaning: I would like lunch and a drink
want.sentence: I want lunch and a drink.

drink.simpleMeaning: Something you sip, like water or juice
drink.contextMeaning: A liquid to have with lunch
drink.sentence: I want lunch and a drink.

look.simpleMeaning: Use your eyes to watch something
look.contextMeaning: Check the menu before deciding what to order
look.sentence: A: Let’s look at the menu first.

first.simpleMeaning: Before the others; at the start
first.contextMeaning: Before anything else, they want to check the menu
first.sentence: A: Let’s look at the menu first.

see.simpleMeaning: Use your eyes and notice something
see.contextMeaning: The speaker notices a chicken sandwich

oh.contextMeaning: The speaker is surprised or understands something
oh.sentence: B: Oh no, it is sold out.

sold.contextMeaning: The food is all gone; none is left to buy
sold.sentence: B: Oh no, it is sold out.

really.simpleMeaning: Very much; asking if it is true
really.contextMeaning: The speaker is surprised and wants to know if it is true

small.contextMeaning: It is only a little problem

choose.contextMeaning: They can pick something different now
choose.sentence: B: Yes, but we can choose again.

again.contextMeaning: They can make a new choice one more time
again.sentence: B: Yes, but we can choose again.

else.contextMeaning: The speaker asks what other things are available

there.contextMeaning: In that place, the salad and fries are available

salad.contextMeaning: A food made with vegetables is available
salad.sentence: B: There is a salad and fries.

fries.sentence: B: There is a salad and fries.

sounds.contextMeaning: The salad seems good to the speaker

good.contextMeaning: The salad sounds tasty and okay to eat

tea.sentence: B: Tea or water sounds nice.

water.simpleMeaning: Clear drink from taps or bottles
water.sentence: B: Tea or water sounds nice.

nice.contextMeaning: The drink sounds pleasant and good
nice.sentence: B: Tea or water sounds nice.

juice.contextMeaning: A drink the person wants today

yen.contextMeaning: The price is shown in Japanese money

fine.contextMeaning: That choice is okay with me

total.contextMeaning: The full price for everything is 330 yen
total.sentence: B: So, your total is 330 yen.

check.contextMeaning: Look at the prices or information

then.contextMeaning: After this, the full price is 600 yen
then.sentence: B: Then my total is 600 yen.

better.contextMeaning: This choice is nicer than the other one

ask.contextMeaning: Speak to the cashier and request something
ask.sentence: B: We should ask the cashier politely.

cashier.contextMeaning: The shop worker who helps with payment
cashier.sentence: B: We should ask the cashier politely.

politely.contextMeaning: Speak in a kind and respectful way
politely.sentence: B: We should ask the cashier politely.

please.simpleMeaning: A kind word when asking for something
please.contextMeaning: A polite word added when asking for salad or fries
please.sentence: Can I have the salad, please?

natural.contextMeaning: It sounds normal and easy, not weird

sit.simpleMeaning: Rest on a chair or bench
sit.contextMeaning: Move to a place and rest there
sit.sentence: B: Let’s sit near the window.

near.sentence: B: Let’s sit near the window.

window.simpleMeaning: Glass part in a wall to look out
window.contextMeaning: The glass place in the wall by the table
window.sentence: B: Let’s sit near the window.

field.simpleMeaning: A big open place with grass
field.contextMeaning: The open grassy place they can see

solve.simpleMeaning: Find the right way to fix something
solve.contextMeaning: Fix the menu problem by making a choice
solve.sentence: B: And I can solve a menu problem.

well.contextMeaning: They did a good job today

hard.sentence: B: Yes, and it was not hard.

answer.simpleMeaning: What you say when someone asks

one.sentence: Emi and Leo solve one small problem by choosing again.

choosing.contextMeaning: Picking again instead of the first choice
choosing.sentence: Emi and Leo solve one small problem by choosing again.

place.simpleMeaning: A spot where people can go or stay
place.contextMeaning: A spot in the restaurant where they can sit
place.sentence: They order politely, check the prices, and choose a place to sit.

useful.simpleMeaning: Good for helping you do something
useful.contextMeaning: Good English that helps in school or at work
useful.sentence: That is useful real-life English for school or work.

real-life.simpleMeaning: From everyday life, not a game
real-life.contextMeaning: English people use in normal daily life
real-life.sentence: That is useful real-life English for school or work.

work.simpleMeaning: The job you do to earn money
work.contextMeaning: A job or office where people use English
work.sentence: That is useful real-life English for school or work.

questions.simpleMeaning: Things you ask to get answers
questions.contextMeaning: Short things you ask to keep talking
questions.sentence: Small questions can keep a conversation moving.

keep.contextMeaning: Help the talk continue without stopping
keep.sentence: Small questions can keep a conversation moving.

conversation.sentence: Small questions can keep a conversation moving.

moving.sentence: Small questions can keep a conversation moving.

thanks.simpleMeaning: A kind word for helping or giving
thanks.contextMeaning: A kind way to say thank you
thanks.sentence: Thanks for learning with Ovi English School.

learning.simpleMeaning: Getting new things into your mind
learning.contextMeaning: Studying English with Ovi English School
learning.sentence: Thanks for learning with Ovi English School.

talk.sentence: You can do this, and you are ready for lunch talk now.

opening.contextMeaning: The first part of the lesson or video

news.contextMeaning: A short report or scene with people speaking

story.simpleMeaning: A made-up or true thing told in words
story.contextMeaning: A short scene with people and dialogue

question.simpleMeaning: Something you ask to get an answer
question.contextMeaning: A thing Emi and Leo need to answer
question.sentence: [PRACTICE] QUESTION: What do Emi and Leo want before club time?

item.simpleMeaning: One thing you can buy or use
item.contextMeaning: One thing in the store that is sold out
item.sentence: QUESTION: What item is sold out?

chooses.contextMeaning: She picks a salad and juice
chooses.sentence: ANSWER: She chooses a salad and juice.

why.contextMeaning: Asks for the reason Leo checks the total again
why.sentence: QUESTION: Why does Leo check the total again?

wants.simpleMeaning: Needs or hopes to have something

wants.sentence: ANSWER: He wants to make sure the price is correct.

make.contextMeaning: Help the sentence be easy to follow
make.sentence: ANSWER: He wants to make sure the price is correct.

sure.sentence: ANSWER: He wants to make sure the price is correct.

price.contextMeaning: The money needed for the food
price.sentence: ANSWER: He wants to make sure the price is correct.

correct.sentence: ANSWER: He wants to make sure the price is correct.

where.contextMeaning: Asks about the place they will sit
where.sentence: QUESTION: Where do they decide to sit?

decide.sentence: QUESTION: Where do they decide to sit?

happened.simpleMeaning: Came to be or took place

starts.sentence: ANSWER: The order starts, then the sold-out problem comes.

sold-out.contextMeaning: There is none left to buy
sold-out.sentence: ANSWER: The order starts, then the sold-out problem comes.

comes.contextMeaning: The problem happens after the order begins
comes.sentence: ANSWER: The order starts, then the sold-out problem comes.

think.simpleMeaning: Use your mind to have an idea
think.contextMeaning: Ask if you believe the students stay calm

students.simpleMeaning: Children or people learning in school
students.contextMeaning: People in school who are being asked about staying calm

stay.simpleMeaning: Keep being in one place or way
stay.sentence: QUESTION: Do you think the students stay calm?

calm.sentence: QUESTION: Do you think the students stay calm?

makes.contextMeaning: Helps the conversation be easy to understand
makes.sentence: QUESTION: What makes the conversation easy to follow?

follow.sentence: QUESTION: What makes the conversation easy to follow?

short.sentence: ANSWER: The short sentences make it easy to follow.

sentences.simpleMeaning: Groups of words that say one idea
sentences.contextMeaning: Small groups of words in the answer

if.simpleMeaning: When this happens, then that can happen

here.contextMeaning: In this lesson or this question

how.contextMeaning: Asking about the way to change a choice politely
how.sentence: DISCUSSION: How would you change your choice calmly?

change.contextMeaning: Choose a different answer or idea

choice.simpleMeaning: Something you pick from many things
choice.contextMeaning: The thing you picked in this discussion

calmly.sentence: DISCUSSION: How would you change your choice calmly?

happen.contextMeaning: A small problem may start in this place

people.sentence: DISCUSSION: How can two people decide together politely?

together.contextMeaning: Both people do it at the same time

as.simpleMeaning: In the same role or way

student.simpleMeaning: A person who learns at school

different.sentence: SPEAKING: Ask for a different option politely.

option.sentence: SPEAKING: Ask for a different option politely.

finish.contextMeaning: End the roleplay with one answer
